description: Workflow for generating inventory reports by fetching data, calculating metrics, and completing the report.
name: inventory_report_generation_workflow

transitions.description: Start the inventory report generation workflow
transitions.end_state_description: Inventory data fetched from external API
transitions.name: start_inventory_report_generation

externalized_processors.description: Fetch inventory data from external API and attach to entity
externalized_processors.name: processFetchInventoryData

transitions.start_state_description: Initial state with no inventory report

transitions.description: Calculate total items, average price, and total value from fetched data
transitions.name: calculate_inventory_report_metrics

externalized_processors.description: Calculate report metrics and update entity
externalized_processors.name: processCalculateReport

transitions.start_state_description: Inventory data fetched from external API

transitions.description: Complete the inventory report generation workflow
transitions.name: complete_inventory_report

externalized_processors.description: Finalize and complete the report entity
externalized_processors.name: processCompleteReport
